titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1344
GA 1344
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: First hand and correction at 7.17 changed by David Parker.
Verse break moved at 6.54-6 by David Parker.
Ab tag moved to after witness end tag at 18.21 by Rachel Kevern.
εχαζειν changed to εχαρειν at 8.56 by Rachel Kevern.
11.10 block marker moved back two words by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 12.15 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 5.5 by David Parker.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Word break in 13.27 corrected by David Parker.
Ghost page removed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status: G-A Number: 1344 Jerusalem, Orthod. Patriarchat, Saba 413 Name of book transcribed:Fourth Gospel First folio transcribed: 174 recto Base text used: TRns Transcribed by: WJE Transcription begun: 01-01-13 Transcription finished: 31-01-13 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - No Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: 1.8 omitted.5.41 omitted.6.55 omitted.17.22 omitted.Ms breaks off at 18.21FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103
